stemHtml:
Refer to Jeppesen GSPRM Training Route Manual - Chart "E LO 2".
Select the correct interpretation of the chart symbols at airfield Waterford (52°11’N, 007°05’W):

options.a: Civil aerodrome, IFR, NDB and ILS.
options.b: Military aerodrome, IFR, VOR/DME and ILS.
options.c: Civil aerodrome, IFR, VOR/DME and ILS.
